title: NTA NCHMJEE Result / Score Card 2026 for Hotel Management Course
short_info: National Testing Agency NTA has released the Exam City 2026 for Exam Date 25/04/2026 | National Council of Hotel Management NCHMJEE 2026 Those Candidates are Enrolled to the Admsission in National Council of Hotel Management NCHMJEE 2026 Exam Can Download Admit Card.candidates should read the NCHMJEE 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply.
